title: nilgirianthus heyneanus
intro: Nilgirianthus heyneanus is a type of flowering plant native to India and Sri Lanka, also known as the " Nilgiri cordia". This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nilgirianthus heyneanus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicines to leverage its medicinal properties.
